title: Tom's Craftable Items
description: This datapack adds recipes for almost all uncraftable items.
body: # Tom's Craftable Items Unleash new crafting possibilities in your Minecraft world! Transform your gameplay with **Tom's Craftable Items**—the datapack/mod that finally lets you craft previously uncraftable items. Enjoy more creativity, flexibility, and fun, whether you’re playing survival or creative! ## ✨ Features - Brand new recipes: Unlock crafting for items that were only obtainable through loot, trades, or commands. - Balanced and fair: Every recipe is carefully designed to fit seamlessly into vanilla gameplay and maintain balance. - Easy installation: Add the datapack or mod to your world or server—no hassle required. - Perfect for all playstyles: Complete your collection or just make rare items more accessible. ## 🛠️ Examples of New Crafting Recipes | **Item** | **Original Source** | **Now Craftable With...** | |---------------------------|:-----------------------:|----------------------------:| | Saddle | Dungeon loot, trading | Custom recipe | | Name Tag | Dungeon loot, fishing | Custom recipe | | Elytra | End cities | Custom recipe | | Totem of Undying | Raid | Custom recipe | ## 🌟 Why Choose Tom's Craftable Items? - **Expand your crafting options** - **Say goodbye to RNG and rare loot dependency** - **Enhance your gameplay flexibility** - **Perfect for custom maps, SMPs, and modpacks** ## 📥 Installation 1. Download the datapack or mod file. 2. Place it in your world’s `datapacks` folder (for datapacks) or `mods` folder (for mods). 3. Reload your world or restart your server. 4. Enjoy crafting those elusive items! Make the impossible possible—craft what you couldn’t before, with Tom's Craftable Items!
